## The Triangle’s Largest Business Membership Organization
With over 1,800 member firms representing two-thirds of the private sector employment in Wake County, we support the interests of our local business community.
​We are paving the way forward to fully embrace the rapid progress of our region by:

column2:
![Picture](https://raleighchamber.org/uploads/5/4/7/3/54735871/web-240524-priorityiconsblue-01-1_orig.png)

Creating new jobs and attracting capital investment.
column4:
![Picture](https://raleighchamber.org/uploads/5/4/7/3/54735871/web-240524-priorityiconsblue-03_orig.png)

Focusing on transportation and infrastructure needs in our community.
column6:
![Picture](https://raleighchamber.org/uploads/5/4/7/3/54735871/web-240524-priorityiconsblue-05_orig.png)

Strengthening member businesses through diverse programming and resources.

column3:
## Become a Member

Collaboration strengthens our economy, creates meaningful connections, and produces new opportunities for growth. Learn more about how to join our Chamber community, and all of the benefits membership includes for you and your business.

column2:
## UPCOMING EVENTS

The Chamber provides experiences, events, and resources for new, emerging, and established businesses that create profitability for members and build community leadership.

## Stay Informed

Subscribe to stay up to date on the latest Chamber news and events, and tailor your subscription to fit your business goals.

column1: ## Programs of the Greater Raleigh Chamber

column3:
​​
​Over **1,800** member businesses.
​

More than **140** events presented for over **10,000** attendees annually.
​

Contributed to the announcement of more than **10,000** new jobs and over **$4.3 billion** in capital investment in the last 5 years.
​

CNBC ranked North Carolina as the **#1** state for business in 2022, 2023 **AND** 2025.
